changes: Rewrote RegisterResult.tsx presentation to match 05-registrar-resultado.png 1:1. Replaced old Header with ScreenHeader (back chevron). Added editable score banner card (white rounded-18, dashed underline inputs for team names, large font-num score). Added group labels (FORMATO, PLACAR POR SET, VENCEDOR) using DS uppercase er-grouplabel style. Format Segmented shows all 4 options in one row with green active state. Placar card (white rounded-18 shadow-sm) with set rows: SET label + ScoreStepInline (er-score-step: sunken bg, green-bordered when winning, 30px minus/plus buttons, 21px font-num value) + x separator + remove X button. Adicionar set as white card-like button with shadow-sm. Winner pills as rounded-full chips (green-500 active, white+shadow inactive). Helper text below. Bottom dock with primary save button (check icon, shows Defina o vencedor when disabled) and ghost Salvar e registrar outra partida. Format change auto-adjusts set count. All hooks/navigation/mutations preserved.
